methods.description: Procedure for measuring the dimensions (length and width) of fossil rhinoceros teeth using a digital caliper, following specific definitions for length and width.

steps.description: Measurements (in mm) were taken with a digital caliper to 0.01 mm
steps.searchable_summary: Measure fossil tooth dimensions using digital caliper

steps.description: and rounded to the nearest 0.1 mm.
steps.searchable_summary: Round raw measurements to nearest 0.1 mm

steps.description: The reported measurements for rhinoceros teeth follow Fortelius et al. (1993): length -L (i.e., vestibular length) and width -W (i.e., mesial width for upper teeth, and distal width for lower teeth).
steps.searchable_summary: Define and record specific length (vestibular) and width (mesial/distal) measurements according to standard protocol
outputs: structured tooth measurements (L, W) per specimen

methods.description: Procedure for comparing measured fossil tooth dimensions to published size ranges of different Stephanorhinus species for comparative analysis and taxonomic assessment.

steps.description: The dimensions of Bogovina rhinoceros teeth were compared to the size ranges for S. etruscus, S. hundsheimensis, S. hemitoechus, and S. kirchbergensis, which were obtained based on the data reported by Fortelius et al. (1993), Guérin (1980), Handa and Pandolfi (2016), Pandolfi and Erten (2017), and Pandolfi and Marra (2015).
steps.searchable_summary: Obtain published size ranges (length, width) for comparative species from literature
outputs: comparative species size ranges (min/max L, W)

steps.description: The dimensions of Bogovina rhinoceros teeth were compared to the size ranges for S. etruscus, S. hundsheimensis, S. hemitoechus, and S. kirchbergensis...
steps.searchable_summary: Compare measured fossil tooth dimensions to obtained comparative species size ranges
inputs: structured tooth measurements (L, W) per specimen
comparative species size ranges (min/max L, W)
outputs: comparison results (e.g., within range, shorter/longer, narrower/wider than range)

steps.description: (Implicit from the 'Metric Data' section describing the findings) Interpretation of comparison results to assess taxonomic affinities.
steps.searchable_summary: Interpret comparison results to assess taxonomic affinities based on morphometric data
